article.title: ArXiv to Ban Researchers for a Year if They Submit AI Slop
article.title_zh: ArXiv 將禁止提交 AI 垃圾內容的研究人員一年

article.title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
article.summary: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.
article.title_zh: 研究存儲庫 ArXiv 將禁止讓 AI 完成所有工作的作者一年
article.summary_zh: ArXiv 正在加強對科學論文中大語言模型草率使用的打擊。

article.title: New iPhone Ultra leaks cover release timing, display breakthrough, more
article.summary: New posts from Weibo leaker Instant Digital offer the latest updates on iPhone Ultra’s production status, release timing, crease-free display breakthrough—and a potential hurdle. more…
article.title_zh: 新 iPhone Ultra 洩漏涵蓋發佈時間、螢幕突破等
article.summary_zh: Weibo 爆料者 Instant Digital 的新貼文提供最新的 iPhone Ultra 生產狀態、發佈時間及無折痕螢幕突破的更新。

article.title: Fiber Broadband Association launches AI knowledge tool
article.summary: The Fiber Broadband Association has launched 'Fran,' an AI knowledge tool for the industry that strives to accelerate fiber research, planning and decision-making. #pressrelease
article.title_zh: Fiber Broadband Association 推出 AI 知識工具
article.summary_zh: Fiber Broadband Association 推出名為 Fran 的 AI 知識工具，旨在加速光纖研究、規劃和決策制定。

article.title: Fiber Broadband Association touts record membership activity
article.summary: The Fiber Broadband Association (FBA) said it has added a record 40 net new members so far in 2026. The org said membership has more than tripled in the past five-and-a-half years. #pressrelease
article.title_zh: Fiber Broadband Association 創紀錄會員活動激增
article.summary_zh: Fiber Broadband Association 表示 2026 年迄今已新增 40 個淨會員，會員人數在過去五年半內增長超過三倍。

article.title: NextEra-Dominion Deal Signals New Era of AI Utility Mega-Mergers
article.summary: NextEra Energy Inc. just announced the largest utility acquisition in US history, a $67 billion deal for rival Dominion Energy Inc., suggesting even the industry’s biggest companies need to grow in order to accommodate the power demand driven by artificial intelligence.
article.title_zh: NextEra-Dominion 交易預示著 AI 公用事業大型合併的新時代
article.summary_zh: NextEra Energy Inc. 宣佈以 670 億美元收購競爭對手 Dominion Energy Inc.，這是美國歷史上最大的公用事業收購，表明即使是業界最大的公司也需要增長以應對人工智能驅動的電力需求。

article.title: Kalshi, Polymarket Defy India Ban on Online Betting Platforms
article.summary: Polymarket and Kalshi Inc. have been allowing customers in India to sign up and trade on their prediction markets even after the country’s technology ministry warned that the platforms are illegal.
article.title_zh: Kalshi 和 Polymarket 違抗印度對在線投注平台的禁令
article.summary_zh: Polymarket 和 Kalshi Inc. 一直允許印度客戶註冊並在其預測市場上交易，儘管該國技術部警告這些平台是非法的。

article.title: Charter launches low-latency broadband in multiple markets
article.summary: Targeting apps such as online gaming and improved video calls, Charter Communications has launched a L4S-based low-latency capability in Dallas-Fort Worth, Texas; Reno, Nevada, Rochester, Minnesota, and St. Louis, Missouri. #pressrelease
article.title_zh: Charter在多個市場推出低延遲寬頻服務
article.summary_zh: Charter Communications針對線上遊戲和改善視訊通話等應用，在達拉斯-沃斯堡、雷諾、羅徹斯特和聖路易斯等地推出基於L4S的低延遲寬頻服務。

article.title: Record-high pricing pushes SSD and memory makers to borrow $880 million just to afford buying chips — Adata, TeamGroup, and others take on substantial debt to survive shortages
article.summary: Adata is the largest single borrower in the group, having completed a NT$2 billion convertible bond issuance and secured NT$12 billion in bank loans.
article.title_zh: 創紀錄高價逼迫SSD和記憶體製造商借款8.8億美元以支付晶片成本——Adata、TeamGroup等公司承擔巨額債務以度過短缺期
article.summary_zh: Adata是該集團最大單一借款人，完成了新台幣20億元的可轉換債發行，並獲得新台幣120億元的銀行貸款。

article.title: Enthusiast crams reversed-engineered PS2 into a handheld, designs custom motherboard — bespoke "PlayStation 2 Portable" pairs modern features with original silicon
article.summary: What if you wanted to play PS2 games on the go but didn't want to emulate them? Meet the PS2 Portable: an open-source handheld pieced together with a custom motherboard featuring original PS2 silicon and modern niceties such as hall-effect joysticks. It can play any PS2 game natively for up to 4.5 hours on a single charge, which happens via USB-C.
article.title_zh: 愛好者將逆向工程PS2裝入掌上型設備，設計自訂主機板——定製「PlayStation 2 Portable」結合現代功能與原始矽晶片
article.summary_zh: 如果您想在移動中玩PS2遊戲，但不想使用模擬器呢？認識PS2 Portable：一個開源掌上型設備，採用配備原始PS2矽晶片和現代便利功能（如Hall效應搖桿）的自訂主機板組裝而成，可原生運行任何PS2遊戲長達4.5小時。

article.title: Apple Watch Ultra 4 will be completely redesigned, new rumor claims
article.summary: According to a new rumor, the Apple Watch Ultra 4 will be completely redesigned. This would be the first time Apple changed the design of its most expensive smartwatch since the original Apple Watch Ultra launched back in 2022. Unfortunately, no details about what the Watch Ultra 4 would look like have actually been outed, we are just to expect a big change. The device will also come with a "significant upgrade to sensing functions", the same source claims. It's unclear if this means that new sensors will be added, or the Watch Ultra 4 will still have the same types of sensors as the Watch...
article.title_zh: 傳聞稱 Apple Watch Ultra 4 將進行完全重新設計
article.summary_zh: 根據最新傳聞，Apple Watch Ultra 4 將迎來完全重新設計，這將是自 2022 年原款 Apple Watch Ultra 推出以來首次改變這款高端智慧手錶的外觀設計。

article.title: Anthropic has acquired the dev tools startup used by OpenAI, Google, and Cloudflare
article.summary: Stainless, a New York-based startup, founded in 2022, rose to prominence in the emerging AI industry for automating the creation and maintenance of software development kits, or SDKs — the libraries developers use to interact with APIs.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 收購了被 OpenAI、Google 和 Cloudflare 使用的開發工具初創公司
article.summary_zh: 成立於 2022 年的紐約初創公司 Stainless 因自動化 SDK（軟體開發套件）的創建和維護而在新興 AI 產業中嶄露頭角。

article.title: How to remove your personal data from the internet (and why you can’t afford to wait)
article.summary: Data brokers make a living by selling your personal information for profit. Your phone number, email, home address, and Social Security number could be packaged and sold to spammers, scammers, and identity thieves right now. Your privacy loss is their gain. Apple’s privacy protections can help block some but not all tracking as data harvesting efforts become increasingly sophisticated. If you want to proactively and continuously remove your personal data from broker databases, Incogni makes it easier than ever to fight back and regain control of your privacy. more…
article.title_zh: 如何從網際網路上移除你的個人資料（以及為什麼你不能再等待）
article.summary_zh: 資料仲介靠販售你的個人資訊牟利，你的電話號碼、電子郵件、住址和社會安全號碼可能現在就被打包出售給垃圾郵件發送者、詐騙犯和身分盜竊者。

article.title: Google’s new Gemini Intelligence will only be available on a handful of the best current Android flagships for now
article.summary: A few days ago, Google announced Gemini Intelligence, which seems to be more than just a rebranding effort. It’s actually an impressive set of features that, among other things, can automate multi-step tasks and execute them entirely in the background on its own, including things like sourcing and transforming information and interacting with various apps and websites autonomously on your behalf. There is even a “Rambler” component coming to Gboard that lets you talk freely with any and all filler or crutch words that most of us unintentionally use, and even mix languages in the same...
article.title_zh: Google 新推出的 Gemini Intelligence 目前僅限部分頂級 Android 旗艦機使用
article.summary_zh: Google 宣佈的 Gemini Intelligence 不僅是重新命名，而是一套令人印象深刻的功能集合，可自動執行多步驟任務並在背景獨立運行。

article.title: Samsung meeting transcripts show memory workers offered incredible 607% bonus worth $477,000, while logic chip staff get as little as 50% — union says misbalance 'creates a retention crisis the company cannot afford'
article.summary: Internal Samsung wage negotiation transcripts show the company proposed bonuses of 607% of annual salary for its memory chip division in March,
article.title_zh: 三星會議記錄顯示記憶體工人獲得令人難以置信的607%紅利相當於$477,000，而邏輯晶片員工獲得少至50%——工會稱不平衡「造成公司無法承受的人才流失危機」
article.summary_zh: 三星內部薪資談判記錄顯示該公司於3月為記憶體晶片部門提議年薪607%的紅利。

article.title: Gradient Google icon redesign starts rolling out
article.summary: Following our report last month, Google is beginning to roll out its gradient icon redesign for Workspace apps. more…
article.title_zh: Google 漸層圖示重新設計開始推出
article.summary_zh: 繼上月報導後，Google 正開始為 Workspace 應用推出漸層圖示重新設計。

article.title: Apple’s faulty chips are big business for the company, and not just in the MacBook Neo
article.summary: App le has for years been using a procedure known as chip binning to reuse faulty chips in other models of a product, or even entirely different products. A new report gives further examples of cases where Apple has been able to take chips which failed quality control for one product and subsequently use them in another – and says that the practice dates all the way back to the original iPad and iPhone 4 … more…
article.title_zh: Apple 的故障晶片對公司來說是大生意，不只在 MacBook Neo
article.summary_zh: Apple 多年來使用晶片分級程序重複使用故障晶片，新報告披露更多案例顯示 Apple 如何將不符合品質控制的晶片用於其他產品。

article.title: Google’s latest Gemini test could frustrate free users fast
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Google may be testing weekly Gemini usage caps for free users. Screenshots shared online suggest Google is already quietly trialing the change with some users. Google may be preparing to significantly restrict the free tier of Gemini , and we’re seeing the first signs that the company is changing how access limits work behind the scenes. A new leak from AshutoshShrivastava on X reveals that Google is quietly testing weekly usage limits for some Gemini features instead of the shorter rolling limits users are used to. The leaker posted a screenshot that appears to show some free users are now seeing weekly limits attached to Gemini use instead of the usual daily or hourly restrictions.
article.title_zh: Google 最新 Gemini 測試可能快速惹惱免費使用者
article.summary_zh: Google 可能正在測試免費使用者 Gemini 使用量周上限，有跡象表明 Google 已在悄悄試驗此變更。
